caption:
Christmas at the Natural History Museum ✨

Don’t miss the Christmas T. rex 🦖 inside the Natural History Museum in London this festive season @natural_history_museum (located in the Dinosaur section)

While you’re exploring the museum, you can also get the same jumper as the T. rex 🎄, along with other beautifully designed Christmas knitwear (made from 100% organic cotton), plus a range of festive, sustainable decorations and winter gifts celebrating the natural world ❄️🌿

🛍️ Shop the festive range in-store or online:
Online shop link: https://bit.ly/49NmZcm (also available in bio)

🎁 Use code KSENIIA15 at checkout to get 15% off* the Natural History Museum’s online range (until 22nd of December)

📍 Natural History Museum, London
